mpp_sequence: SEE → MMD → PLAN → PREFLIGHT → EXECUTE → BTS → AUDIT → RECURSION

mitigation: User education screen for battery exclusions

storage.model: Storage Access Framework (SAF) + persistable URI grants
storage.persist_cap_risk: Persisted URI grants are capped (plan for pruning/re-authorization)

file_profile.large_file_strategy: Blobs API for 1-100MB, LFS guidance for >100MB

ux_goals: Clear failure messages with guided fixes
Minimal steps: pick repo once, reuse
Batch commit: N files → 1 commit when targeting same repo+branch

preflight_gates._description: All UNKNOWN fields below MUST be resolved before production release. Checked at PREFLIGHT stage.
must_resolve_before_execute: android.device_oem — needed to test OEM task killer mitigations
android.android_version — needed to confirm scoped storage behavior
github.account_type — affects rate limits (personal vs org) and branch protection defaults
file_profile.typical_count_per_upload — determines if batch commit is the common path
file_profile.typical_size_mb — determines if Blobs API is the common path
file_profile.max_expected_size_mb — determines if LFS flow needs to be built or just guidance
must_resolve_before_release: GITHUB_CLIENT_ID in build.gradle.kts — replace placeholder with registered OAuth App ID
Proguard rules validated with release build
Battery optimization UX tested on at least 2 OEMs
